title: West of Carson City
writer: Milton Raison, Sherman L. Lowe, Jack Bernhard
actors: Johnny Mack Brown, Bob Baker, Fuzzy Knight
plot: When a gold strike turns a ghost town into a boom town, Gorman arrives to open his crooked gambling hall and Judge Harkins arrives to bring law and order. Jim Bannister is aiding the Judge by bringing in Gorman's outlaws and to lu...
